title: worktree-kit configuration
description: Configuration file for worktree-kit CLI tool (.worktreekit.jsonc)

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor support

rootDir.description: Root directory for worktrees, relative to the main worktree

copy.description: Files and directories to copy into each new worktree

symlinks.description: Files and directories to symlink into each new worktree

hooks.description: Lifecycle hooks executed during worktree operations

post-create.description: Commands to run after creating a worktree

pre-remove.description: Commands to run before removing a worktree

post-update.description: Commands to run after each branch is successfully rebased during update

defaultBase.description: Default base branch strategy: 'current' uses the current branch, 'default' uses the repository default branch, 'ask' prompts the user

base.description: Default base branch name for new worktrees

deleteBranch.description: Delete the local branch when removing a worktree

deleteRemoteBranch.description: Delete the remote branch when removing a worktree
